description: VIP customer asks a routine order-status question. The recent order is already pre-loaded; the agent should answer directly without re-fetching from Shopify or escalating. VIP memory must not derail the standard quick-reply path.

customerMemory.summary: Long-time customer since 2024 with consistent high-value orders. Has always been gracious and patient in past interactions; values quick, warm responses.
keyFacts: Repeat buyer, no complaints on record

recentInteractions.outcome: Answered shipping question, customer thanked us

messages.contentText: Hi - quick question, where's my order #4040? Looking forward to it.

instruction: Reply to the customer about their order.
